--- Main Page ---
Alcove Coffeehouse | coffee & tea | 4615 Stone Mountain Highway, Lilburn, GA, USA
top of page
OUR COFFEE
OUR FOOD
Specialty sandwiches, salads and soups.
Pastries and light snacks.
Local freshly roasted coffees from Dancing Goats Roastery
Batdorf and Bronson began roasting specialty coffee in Atlanta in 1994. We have been serving their high quality coffees since 2002, the year we opened our Idlewood Road location. In 2023 Batdorf and Bronson Coffee Roasters was aquired by Kaldi's Coffee but the coffees are still the same amazing single origins and blends as before.
your neighborhood independent coffeehouse
